data.title: Crypto life insurance startup Meanwhile completes $40 million Series A funding, led by Framework and Fulgur
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Meanwhile, a life insurance startup in the cryptocurrency field, announced the completion of a $40 million Series A financing round, with a valuation of $190 million, led by Framework Ventures and Fulgur Ventures. The financing funds will be used for global expansion and compliance construction. Co-founder Zac Townsend said that Bitcoin, as a decentralized value storage tool, has a unique appeal to future generations.

data.title: Tether issues 1 billion USDT on Tron network, bringing total issuance to 9 billion this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @OnchainLens monitoring, Tether issued 1 billion USDT on the Tron network today. Since 2025, Tether has issued 9 billion USDT on the Tron network.

data.title: Bitcoin's Market Dominance Reaches Resistance Zone, Analysts Predict Altcoin Rebound
data.description:
According to PANews, cryptocurrency analyst El Crypto has revealed data indicating that Bitcoin's market dominance has surpassed 60% and reached a resistance zone. Based on historical trends over the past year and a half, this suggests the trend may be entering a correction phase. Additionally, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is in the overbought region, which could favor altcoins and potentially lead to a rebound.

Cryptocurrency analyst Kevin Capital also appears optimistic about the future performance of altcoins. However, he cautions that Ethereum (ETH) might not follow the same trend, as it has underperformed throughout the cycle.

data.title: Trader Eugene Exits Short Position Amid Market Strength
data.description: According to Odaily, trader Eugene announced that he has exited his short position, limiting the risk to 2%. He noted that the market is showing significant strength, with key levels, such as SOL at $125, being reclaimed. As a result, Eugene has decided to adopt a wait-and-see approach. Previously, Eugene had taken a minor short position on ETH, SOL, and XRP when BTC reached $83,500.

data.title: BTC breaks through 84,000 USDT, up 3.13% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC has broken through 84,000 USDT and is now at 84,002.8 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 3.13%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Trader Eugene: I have stopped the previous short position, the market is showing strength and I will wait and see
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily reported that trader Eugene wrote that his short position had been stopped out and the risk of this transaction was controlled at 2%. He pointed out that the market is showing significant strength and key positions (such as $125 in SOL) have a tendency to be re-occupied, so he will temporarily move to the sidelines.
According to previous news, Eugene had slightly shorted ETH, SOL and XRP when BTC hit $83,500.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,600 USDT with a 2.37% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 12, 2025, 08:11 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,600.069946 USDT, with a narrowed 2.37% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: ZhongAn Bank survey: More than 3/4 of respondents hope Hong Kong will expand cryptocurrency support and use stablecoins such as Tether and USDC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A survey conducted by ZA Bank in Hong Kong over the past three weeks showed that its customers welcome buying cryptocurrencies through banks, with 81% of respondents hoping that banks can directly transfer cryptocurrencies in and out like cash, rather than simply providing cryptocurrency trading solutions. More than three-quarters of respondents hope that Hong Kong can support a wider range of cryptocurrencies and hope to be able to use mainstream stablecoins such as Tether and USDC. In addition, due to the previous hacking of ByBit cryptocurrency exchange funds, more than three-quarters of customers also expressed trust in banks as managers of their cryptocurrency funds and trust banks for risk control and fraud prevention. (LedgerInsights) Note: ZA Bank was founded by ZA International and was granted a license by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority on March 27, 2019 to provide banking services through online channels. In November 2024, it announced the launch of cryptocurrency trading services on its App, allowing users to buy and sell Bitcoin and Ethereum through Hong Kong dollars and US dollars.

data.title: BABY broke through 0.16 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 102.72%
data.description: OKX market data shows that BABY broke through 0.16 USDT and is temporarily reported at 0.16431 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 102.72%.

data.title: U.S. senators propose emissions tax on blockchain and AI data centres under clean cloud act
data.description:
12-4-2025 – A fresh legislative proposal has emerged from the U. S. Senate, aiming to slap emissions-based charges on data centres powering blockchain networks and artificial intelligence operations.
